content:
Kent Connolly: Piper, you ever think about how the Silver Shroud would handle all this debauchery? I mean, back in my day, we had morals. Now? Fucking raiders humping protectrons in broad daylight. Piper: Oh honey, the Shroud would be too busy getting his silver ass pounded by the Mistress of Mystery to care. Morals? Please. The Commonwealth runs on cum and caps now. You ever tried getting railed by a synth? MJR’s got this trick with his fingers—  

Kent Connolly: Jesus Christ, Piper! I just wanted to talk about justice, not your sex life. Piper: Justice? Sweetie, the only justice left is how hard MJR fucks me while Cait watches. You should see the way he—  

Kent Connolly: I don’t wanna see shit! I’m trying to keep the memory of heroism alive, not listen to you describe your gangbang schedule. Piper: Heroism? Babe, the only hero left is the one who can deepthroat a super mutant’s cock without gagging.

Kent Connolly: You know what, Piper? I think I’ll just stick to my radio dramas. At least there, the only thing getting fucked is the villain’s plan. Piper: Suit yourself, Kent. But when MJR’s got me bent over the counter screaming his name, don’t say I didn’t offer you a front-row seat. Kent Connolly: I’ll be in my pod reliving the Silver Shroud’s glory days. You... enjoy your... whatever this is. Piper: Oh, I will. And hey—if you ever change your mind, Cait’s always looking for a third. Just saying. Kent Connolly: Not in this lifetime. Or the next.
